item.title: CVE-2026-48710 - CVE-2026-48710 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown

来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
supply-chain-guard: Detect, assess, and respond to supply chain attacks across npm/yarn and Python (pip/poetry/uv). Claude Code skill + standalone scripts. Built during axios RAT (2026-03-31) and Starlette BadHost CVE-2026-48710 (2026-05-22).

CVE-2026-31802: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.
